chapter_title.en: Chapter on Fasting Upon Sighting the Moon and Breaking the Fast Upon Sighting the Moon

text: 1918 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِذَا صَحَّ هِلاَلُ رَجَبٍ فَعُدَّ تِسْعَةً وَ خَمْسِينَ يَوْماً وَ صُمْ يَوْمَ اَلسِّتِّينَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1918 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"If the crescent of Rajab is confirmed, count fifty-nine days and fast on the sixtieth day."
